ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "last_dividend" REAL /* Last dividend paid */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the stock was added to the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being monitored */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock for the trading period */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock for the trading period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock for the trading period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock for the trading period */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the period */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for the period */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prices were recorded */,
  "source_feed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data feed source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_source_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_feed_id") REFERENCES market_data_feeds ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "trading_day" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of trading session (e.g., regular, pre-market, post-market) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trading session (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the portfolio was created */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of stock in a portfolio */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio containing the stock */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being held */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Average purchase price of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss of the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Account balance of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_price" REAL /* Price that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, deactivated) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_history" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who executed the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trade occurred */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  "source_feed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data feed source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., executed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_source_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_feed_id") REFERENCES market_data_feeds ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., exchange, provider) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update for the data feed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data feed (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the reliability of the data feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)
